messages.content:
You are a relevance classifier for a portfolio risk app.

For each article below, determine if it's relevant to any of the given positions.

Positions:
{positions}

Articles:
{articles}

Return JSON array where each entry has:
- "article_index": 0-based index
- "relevant": true/false
- "affected_tickers": ["NVDA", "AAPL"] (if relevant)
- "event_type": "company_specific|macro|sector|theme|irrelevant"
- "why_it_matters": one sentence

Rules:
- If article mentions a held ticker by name or alias → relevant (company_specific)
- If macro/financial news matches position themes → relevant (macro/sector)
- Analyst downgrades/upgrades with price targets → minor, still relevant
- General market commentary with no specific tickers → irrelevant unless macro theme matches
- Only flag articles as relevant if there's a clear connection to held positions

Positions: - ABT: growth archetype - AOS: growth archetype Articles: [0] Title: TD Cowen reiterates Buy on Abbott Labs stock, cites Cologuard strength Summary: A. O. Smith Reports Quarterly Dividend< [3] Title: AOS Stock Price, Quote & Chart | SMITH (A.O.) CORP (NYSE:AOS) Summary: AOS Stock Price, Quote & Chart | SMITH (A.O.) CORP (NYSE:AOS)  C [4] Title: A.O. Smith Corp. stock (US0003711006): Why water heating strength now outweighs industrial shifts? Summary:

response:
```json
[
  {
    "article_index": 0,
    "relevant": true,
    "affected_tickers": ["ABT"],
    "event_type": "company_specific",
    "why_it_matters": "TD Cowen reiterating Buy rating on Abbott Labs with Cologuard strength highlights positive analyst sentiment directly impacting the ABT growth position."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 1,
    "relevant": true,
    "affected_tickers": ["ABT"],
    "event_type": "company_specific",
    "why_it_matters": "Wall Street forecasters updating Abbott expectations ahead of Q1 earnings provides material guidance information for the ABT position."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 2,
    "relevant": true,
    "affected_tickers": ["AOS"],
    "event_type": "company_specific",
    "why_it_matters": "A. O. Smith reporting quarterly dividend is directly relevant to the AOS growth position and represents shareholder return news."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 3,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "This is a generic stock quote/chart page rather than news content with actionable information for the AOS position."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 4,
    "relevant": true,
    "affected_tickers": ["AOS"],
    "event_type": "company_specific",
    "why_it_matters": "Analysis of A. O. Smith stock performance with focus on water heating segment strength provides relevant fundamental context for the AOS position."
  }
]
```
